records.ety: [NL., fr. L. scandere, scansum, to climb.]

defs: An artificial group of birds formerly regarded as an order. They are distributed among several orders by modern ornithologists.
notes: ☞ The toes are in pairs, two before and two behind, by which they are enabled to cling to, and climb upon, trees, as the woodpeckers, parrots, cuckoos, and trogons.
